brief: Today's news features the US Mint's Trump coin, wildfires in Ontario impacting air quality, and ongoing ICE controversies. Research papers introduce CD-MED for multimodal emotion descriptors and GraphPolaris for graph database visualization.
news_summary: The US Treasury announced a new $1 coin featuring Trump, the first living president on US currency. Wildfires in Ontario cause poor air quality in Toronto and NYC, while ICE faces scrutiny over traffic stops and detainee deaths.
papers_summary: CD-MED proposes cross-domain multimodal emotion descriptors for digital objects, and GraphPolaris offers a new system for querying and visualizing graph databases.

en.brief: Today's news features the US Mint's Trump coin, wildfires in Ontario impacting air quality, and ongoing ICE controversies. Research papers introduce CD-MED for multimodal emotion descriptors and GraphPolaris for graph database visualization.
en.news_summary: The US Treasury announced a new $1 coin featuring Trump, the first living president on US currency. Wildfires in Ontario cause poor air quality in Toronto and NYC, while ICE faces scrutiny over traffic stops and detainee deaths.
en.papers_summary: CD-MED proposes cross-domain multimodal emotion descriptors for digital objects, and GraphPolaris offers a new system for querying and visualizing graph databases.

zh.brief: 今日新闻聚焦中国拘留地震学家、经济增长放缓至4.3%、毒枭王哥的跨国网络以及霸王龙化石拍卖纪录。研究论文涉及跨模态情感描述符和图数据库可视化。
zh.news_summary: 中国拘留研究朝鲜核试验的地震学家，经济增速创2022年底以来新低；毒枭张智栋（王哥）被美国指控；霸王龙化石以5010万美元成交。
zh.papers_summary: 英文预印本研究包括跨模态情感描述符、图数据库可视化、AI研究助手等，未涉及中文论文。

todays_image.caption: Both the Tyrannosaurus rex and the Trump $1 coin are apex predators of their respective eras, dominating through sheer force of presence.
todays_image.title: Tyrannosaurus rex Osborn, 1905
